message:
fix(fr-runtime): RESET clears CLIENT SETINFO LIB-NAME/LIB-VER + last_command_name (br-frankenredis-s13v)

Upstream networking.c::resetCommand restores the post-handshake
state by clearing every per-connection bit set since accept(),
including:
  * c->lib_name / c->lib_ver (set via CLIENT SETINFO)
  * the cached last-command-name used in CLIENT INFO output
  * authentication, transaction, pubsub, db, RESP, name, tracking,
    no-evict, no-touch, reply mode (already clear)

Our reset_connection_state was missing the lib_name / lib_ver
clears, so a client that called CLIENT SETINFO LIB-NAME ... and
then RESET would still see the old values in CLIENT INFO. Fix
the gap and update the existing test (which had pinned the
incorrect 'preserves' behavior) plus the matching fixture
case in core_client.json (renamed to
client_info_after_reset_clears_setinfo).

fr-runtime 281 passed; fr-conformance 184 passed; cargo clippy
--tests -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Closes br-frankenredis-s13v.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
